raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding an unauthorized and illegal charge on my account, which I did not approve. Despite reaching out to American Express ( Amex ) regarding this issue, the company has been completely unhelpful in addressing or resolving the dispute. 

I clearly communicated that this charge was unauthorized, and I even contacted the charge-disputing company directly. However, the representatives I spoke to seemed unable, or unwilling, to assist me in resolving the matter. After multiple frustrating exchanges, I was left with the impression that speaking to a supervisor or higher-level representative would be impossible. 

To make matters worse, not only has the issue with the unauthorized charge not been resolved, but I was also charged additional late fees without any communication or updates about the status of my case. The lack of transparency and the continued billing for charges I did not authorize is unacceptable. The level of service provided has been so inadequate that it has seriously affected my willingness to continue pursuing this matter through normal channels. 

I am requesting a full explanation from the company regarding what happened with my case and the steps being taken to resolve this issue. I would like detailed information about the status of my dispute, the actions taken, and the steps Amex will take to rectify this situation. 

If this issue is not resolved promptly, I will have no choice but to pursue further action, as this matter infringes upon my rights and I will not tolerate being charged for unauthorized transactions. I expect a timely and satisfactory response to this matter.
